coordinate_provenance.original_place_text: Botai culture of the Central Asian steppes
coordinate_provenance.geocoder_or_gazetteer: repository-curated archaeological site anchor
coordinate_provenance.confidence_rationale: The archived paper names Botai explicitly, but does not ship a direct coordinate pair in the local source archive, so the current coordinate is an approximate named-site geocode.
coordinate_provenance.interpretation_note: Botai remains the only clearly named domesticated-core horse site that currently earns point-level publication.
